description: |-
  Remove null and empty string values from a list or map

# `compact` Function

Remove null and empty string values from a list or map

Returns the input list or map with all null values and empty strings removed.

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
compact(input dynamic) dynamic
```

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `input` (Dynamic) The list or map to compact.
<!-- variadic argument generated by tfplugindocs -->


## Example Usage

```console
> provider::util::compact(["a", null, "", "b"])
tolist(["a", "b"])

> provider::util::compact({ a = 1, b = null, c = 3, d = [] })
tomap({ a = 1, c = 3, d = tolist([]) })

> provider::util::compact({ x = "keep", y = null, z = "" })
tomap({ x = "keep" })
```

### HCL Example

```terraform
locals {
  features = {
    api     = true
    web     = false
    metrics = null
    cache   = "enabled"
  }
}

# Returns {api = true, web = false, cache = "enabled"} — nulls removed
output "compact_map" {
  value = provider::util::compact(local.features)
}
```
